title: The Grand Maneuver
writer: René Clair, Jérôme Géronimi, Jean Marsan
actors: Michèle Morgan, Gérard Philipe, Jean Desailly
plot: A French lieutenant makes a bet that he can seduce any woman in town in the two weeks before his regiment leaves for maneuvers, but his chosen target (a Parisian divorcée) isn't like other girls he's known.
